rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amendment To The Complaint Substituting Deft'S True Name For Doe #1
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 21, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF GARY STRENG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amendment To The Complaint Substituting Deft'S True Name For Doe #1. DENIED. Even if Plaintiff lacked "concrete evidence" (Darsky Declaration 2:16) of Mr. Comella's liability until December 2013, Plaintiff knew of the facts giving rise to a cause of action against Ms. Comella: "[Mr. Comella] said he was acting on behalf of Mr. Camozzi, which I had no reason not to believe from what Mr. Camozzi told me." Streng Deposition Transcript 159: 24-160:1. = (501/REQ)
